summary: Repository initialized with persistent memory layer.

Strengthened CLAUDE.md integration snippet: agents now read facts.md at task start (proactive, not on-request), write-triggers are inlined in the snippet, and a precedence rule routes project context here instead of agent-local memory stores. Repo now dogfoods via its own CLAUDE.md.

echo >> silently corrupts memory-log.jsonl if the file lacks a trailing newline: the new JSON object glues onto the last line, breaking JSONL parsing. Ensure the file ends with a newline before appending; validate with python3 json.loads per line.

Simplified instruction docs: command recipes replaced by a format contract (schema, type table, triggers, constraints). Removed broken sed formatters (pattern assumed summary adjacent to date; never matched), fixed unexpanded $(date +%F) in single quotes, fixed apostrophe shell error in example entry. Root README cheat sheet deleted; docs/memory/README.md is the single source for the contract.
